case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. AMPARO T GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-02-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-22-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-10-2014 CONTINUED TO OCT-22-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
